title: pleopeltis tenuiloris
intro: Pleopeltis tenuiloris, also known as the slender polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pleopeltis tenuiloris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pleopeltis tenuiloris are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice to aid in skin and wound care.
